chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition.No.D-574 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.2572/2021 (U/A) 02. For orders on office objection “A” 03. For orders on M.A.No.2534/2021 (E/A) 04. For hearing of main case. 21.10.2021 Mr. Wajid Hussain Khoso, Advocate for the petitioners. = * = * = * = * = * = 01. Urgency granted. 02 to 04. The petitioners by way of instant constitution petition have sought for quashment of F.I.R No.55/2021, which is registered at Police Station SITE Area, Sukkur. The petitioners are having a remedy for the needful at Sukkur Bench. The instant petition being incompetent is dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E
